title: Junior Revenue Manager at Dineout Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Dineout Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Dineout Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dineout Capital India:
Dineout Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout Capital India!
